events.text: Goal!  Netherlands 1, USA 0. Memphis Depay (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries.
Goal!  Netherlands 2, USA 0. Daley Blind (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries.
Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Netherlands 2, USA 1. Haji Wright (USA) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Christian Pulisic.
Goal!  Netherlands 3, USA 1. Denzel Dumfries (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Daley Blind with a cross.
Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
